category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask / KN95) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Kazakhstan market (EAEU TR CU 019/2011, mandatory EAC certification, GOST EN 149-type harmonised standards).

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器出口哈萨克斯坦（FFP/EAEU）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器出口哈薩克斯坦（FFP/EAEU）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Kazakhstan requirements under the EAEU technical regulation TR CU 019/2011 (On the safety of personal protective equipment), mandatory EAC certification by an EAEU-accredited conformity assessment body, GOST EN 149-type harmonised standards for filtering facepiece respirators, EAC marking, Russian/Kazakh-language labelling obligations, and the applicability of TR EAEU 037/2016 (RoHS-style restriction of hazardous substances) to electrical PPE components.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与哈萨克斯坦要求对照，涵盖欧亚经济联盟技术法规TR CU 019/2011（个人防护设备安全）、欧亚认可合格评定机构强制EAC认证、过滤半面罩GOST EN 149型协调标准、EAC标志、俄语/哈萨克语标注义务，以及TR EAEU 037/2016（类RoHS危险物质限制）对电气PPE部件的适用性。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與哈薩克斯坦要求對照，涵蓋歐亞經濟聯盟技術法規TR CU 019/2011（個人防護設備安全）、歐亞認可合格評定機構強制EAC認證、過濾半面罩GOST EN 149型協調標準、EAC標誌、俄語/哈薩克語標注義務，以及TR EAEU 037/2016（類RoHS危險物質限制）對電氣PPE部件的適用性。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EAEU technical regulations, harmonised GOST standards, accredited conformity assessment body scope, and Kazakhstan market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行欧亚经济联盟技术法规、协调GOST标准、认可合格评定机构范围及哈萨克斯坦市场监督实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行歐亞經濟聯盟技術法規、協調GOST標準、認可合格評定機構範圍及哈薩克斯坦市場監督實踐。

answer_first.en: Kazakhstan is a full EAEU member: respiratory PPE (FFP masks, particle respirators) must comply with TR CU 019/2011 (On the safety of personal protective equipment) and undergo mandatory EAC certification — not a declaration — by an EAEU-accredited certification body. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not satisfy GOST EN 149-type EAEU requirements. Products must bear the EAC mark with Russian and Kazakh-language labelling. TR EAEU 037/2016 (RoHS-style hazardous substance restrictions) applies to any electrical PPE components.
answer_first.zh: 哈萨克斯坦是欧亚经济联盟正式成员：呼吸PPE（FFP口罩、颗粒物呼吸器）须符合TR CU 019/2011（个人防护设备安全），并须经欧亚认可认证机构强制EAC认证——而非仅作声明。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不满足GOST EN 149型欧亚经济联盟要求。产品须标注EAC标志及俄语/哈萨克语标注。TR EAEU 037/2016（类RoHS危险物质限制）适用于任何电气PPE部件。
answer_first.zht: 哈薩克斯坦是歐亞經濟聯盟正式成員：呼吸PPE（FFP口罩、顆粒物呼吸器）須符合TR CU 019/2011（個人防護設備安全），並須經歐亞認可認證機構強制EAC認證——而非僅作聲明。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不滿足GOST EN 149型歐亞經濟聯盟要求。產品須標注EAC標誌及俄語/哈薩克語標注。TR EAEU 037/2016（類RoHS危險物質限制）適用於任何電氣PPE部件。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or upon TR CU / EAEU technical regulation amendment
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
